description: city in Lake County, Ohio, United States
description_wiki: Painesville is a city in Lake County, Ohio, United States, and its county seat.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: United States Army post in Kentucky, United States
description_wiki: Fort Knox is a United States Army installation in Kentucky, south of Louisville and north of Elizabethtown.
Sergeant (Sgt) is a rank in use by the armed forces of many countries.

description: United States military post located in Killeen, Texas
description_wiki: Fort Hood is a United States Army post located near Killeen, Texas.

description: nuclear-armed recoilless gun of American origin
description_wiki: The M28 or M29 Davy Crockett Weapon System was a tactical nuclear recoilless smoothbore gun for firing the M388 nuclear projectile, armed with the W54 nuclear warhead, that was deployed by the United States during the Cold War.
